subject: [PATCH v2 1/2] iomap: add helper to mark folio uptodate

reviews.author: Darrick J. Wong
reviews.summary: Confirmed that the patch is correct and LGTM. Approved the patch.

2026-06-24.patch_summary: This patch adds an exported helper function iomap_folio_mark_uptodate() to mark a folio as uptodate and update its uptodate bitmap if the folio has iomap state data attached. This is necessary for filesystems like fuse that need to mark a folio as uptodate outside of conventional iomap calls.

reviews.author: Christoph Hellwig
reviews.summary: Identified the need for an exported helper function to mark folios as uptodate and update their uptodate bitmap when iomap state data is attached. Approved the patch.

2026-06-25.patch_summary: This patch adds an exported helper function iomap_folio_mark_uptodate() to mark a folio as uptodate and update its uptodate bitmap if the folio has iomap state data attached. This is necessary for filesystems like fuse that need to mark a folio as uptodate outside of conventional iomap calls.
